root_text.sn35.141:1.2: Yopi hetu yopi paccayo cakkhussa uppādāya, sopi dukkho.
root_text.sn35.141:1.3: Dukkhasambhūtaṁ, bhikkhave, cakkhu kuto sukhaṁ bhavissati …pe…
root_text.sn35.141:1.5: Yopi hetu, yopi paccayo jivhāya uppādāya, sopi dukkho.
root_text.sn35.141:1.6: Dukkhasambhūtā, bhikkhave, jivhā kuto sukhā bhavissati …pe…
root_text.sn35.141:1.8: Yopi hetu yopi paccayo manassa uppādāya, sopi dukkho.
root_text.sn35.141:1.9: Dukkhasambhūto, bhikkhave, mano kuto sukho bhavissati.

translation_text.sn35.141:1.2: The cause and reason that gives rise to the eye is also suffering.
translation_text.sn35.141:1.3: Since the eye is produced by what is suffering, how could it be happiness?
translation_text.sn35.141:1.8: The cause and reason that gives rise to the mind is also suffering.
translation_text.sn35.141:1.9: Since the mind is produced by what is suffering, how could it be happiness?
translation_text.sn35.141:1.11: They understand: ‘… there is nothing further for this place.’”
